'''hawoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:huaquero|huaquero]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-w-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:huaquero|huaquero]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hawoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæweheth|hæweheth]] || [[word:hæwehej|hæwehej]] || [[word:hæwehesh|hæwehesh]] || [[word:hæwehe|hæwehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hawowohoth|hawowohoth]] || [[word:hawowohoj|hawowohoj]] || [[word:hawowohosh|hawowohosh]] || [[word:hawowoho|hawowoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hawohoth|hawohoth]] || [[word:hawohoj|hawohoj]] || [[word:hawohosh|hawohosh]] || [[word:hawoho|hawoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hawofhoth|hawofhoth]] || [[word:hawofhoj|hawofhoj]] || [[word:hawofhosh|hawofhosh]] || [[word:hawofhof|hawofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hawohotho|hawohotho]] || [[word:hawohojo|hawohojo]] || [[word:hawohosho|hawohosho]] || [[word:hawohoko|hawohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hawohoth|hawohoth]] || [[word:hawohoj|hawohoj]] || [[word:hawohosh|hawohosh]] || [[word:hawoho|hawoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hawohothol|hawohothol]] || [[word:hawohojol|hawohojol]] || [[word:hawohoshol|hawohoshol]] || [[word:hawohokol|hawohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hawohothotho|hawohothotho]] || [[word:hawohojojo|hawohojojo]] || [[word:hawohoshosho|hawohoshosho]] || [[word:hawohoko|hawohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hawohothon|hawohothon]] || [[word:hawohojon|hawohojon]] || [[word:hawohoshon|hawohoshon]] || [[word:hawohokon|hawohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hawohothoro|hawohothoro]] || [[word:hawohojoro|hawohojoro]] || [[word:hawohoshoro|hawohoshoro]] || [[word:hawohokoro|hawohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
